summary: End-to-end workflow for designing new workflows with proper step sequencing, agent routing, gates, and validation.

inputs.name: workflow_requirement
inputs.description: The requirement specification for the new workflow.

inputs.name: available_agents
inputs.description: List of available agents for workflow steps.

inputs.name: domain_constraints
inputs.description: Domain-specific constraints that affect workflow design.

outputs.name: workflow_specification
outputs.description: Complete workflow specification in JSON format.

outputs.name: workflow_dossier
outputs.description: Dossier with source provenance and quality score.

outputs.name: workflow_fixtures
outputs.description: Test fixtures for the new workflow.

budget.notes: Stay focused on workflow design lifecycle only.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is new workflow design, not modification or deletion.
Require workflow requirement and available agents before design begins.
Workflow specification must pass format and content validation.
Dossier score must be >= 80 before promotion to staging.
Return workflow spec, dossier, and fixtures with all gates passed.

steps.action: Design the workflow specification with steps, gates, and rollback strategies.
Review the workflow design for architectural fit and system impact.
Evaluate or create the workflow dossier with source provenance.
Generate test fixtures for the new workflow (2 fixtures minimum).
Run final validation on the complete workflow package.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing workflows, agents, and source materials.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write workflow specification, dossier, and fixture files.

tools.name: shell.readonly
tools.purpose: Run validation scripts during workflow design.

verification.method: Check workflow specification has all required fields and steps.
Check test fixtures exist for the new workflow (minimum 2).

success_criteria: Workflow specification passes format and content validation.
Dossier score is >= 80 with complete provenance.
Test fixtures cover primary and edge case scenarios.

rollback.when: If any gate fails, revert to the step before the failure and report the issue.
